brief_notes: Compact, dense baseline paper. No figures. Methods section includes equations and implementation details. All key numbers match extraction: 251 domains, 44-854 residues mean 211, CPE 1s vs TM-Vec 67s, 143 spikes (80/31/32 split), ARI 0.95/1.00/0.87/0.49/0.73/0.56, 4405 models/28 families, 690 bacteriocins, p<10^-16, 96% of 210 types, 65 antihypertensive drugs, n_neighbors 13 min_dist 0.5, pair counts 125869/111349/13431. Missing a Related Work section, shorter Discussion, and no figures. Writing is terse but topic sentences and transitions are reasonable.
